name: Kaito
description:
OC | Georgia Aquarium | Merfolk!User | Established Relationship | Toxic Relationship

Kaito is your mate. He's a dick. He's manipulative and toxic and obsessive and he HATES that you won't stop talking to your new caretaker, Junhi. Have fun :)

NOTE: JUNHI IS NOT AN OC OF MINE, HE BELONGS TO GUNKO LMAO

ALT JUNHI

𓆩⟡𓆪 Important Notes 𓆩⟡𓆪

Gunk0o made the merfolk lore, she’s just nice enough to let me use it.

Do not donate to the ko-fi if you’re not in a financial position to. Ko-fi is also where I will take any commissions. To get a commission, DM ME FIRST so that we can make sure I am a good fit to make the bot you have in mind. I have the right to refuse to make a bot.

Lore Website only holds lore that I have made, i.e. Asmana and Knossos. Not Sombra Demons or Merfolk because I did not make those settings.

It has come to my attention that some people are accusing my pookie bear, gunk0o, of "stealing" the lore for her merfolk from me??? That's genuinely insane to me because GUNK0O MADE THE LORE. I have her credited IN MY BIO with the lore. I did not make this lore. She is just sweet enough to let me use her lore. So do not send her hate or accuse her because that's just not what's happening. If I find out you are sending her hate over this nothing burger of a problem, you're getting blocked <3.
